simple_types.name: CLEAR_CLEAR_Field
simple_types.code:
type CLEAR_CLEAR_Field is
   CLEAR_CLEAR_Field_Reset,
   Clear)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: DEBUGLOCK_DEBUGLOCK_Field
simple_types.code:
type DEBUGLOCK_DEBUGLOCK_Field is
   Unlocked,
   Locked)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Unlocked
enumeration_literals.description: Debug mode locked. Ignores any other value written.

simple_types.name: ENABLE_ENABLE_Field
simple_types.code:
type ENABLE_ENABLE_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: ENABLE_ENABLE_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type ENABLE_ENABLE_Field_1 is
   Disable,
   Enable)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: STATUS_READY_Field
simple_types.code:
type STATUS_READY_Field is
   Ready,
   Busy)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: TASKS_ERASE_TASKS_ERASE_Field
simple_types.code:
type TASKS_ERASE_TASKS_ERASE_Field is
   TASKS_ERASE_TASKS_ERASE_Field_Reset,
   Trigger)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: WRITELOCK_WRITELOCK_Field
simple_types.code:
type WRITELOCK_WRITELOCK_Field is
   Unlocked,
   Locked)
  with Size => 1;

record_types.name: CACHE_Peripheral

fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: Memory address covered by the line to be maintained.

record_types.name: CACHE_PROFILING_Cluster

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: The cache hit counter for cache region.

fields.name: HIT
fields.description: The cache miss counter for cache region.

fields.name: MISS
fields.description: The cache line miss counter for cache region.

fields.name: LMISS
fields.description: Number of reads for cache region.

fields.name: READS
fields.description: Number of writes for cache region.

record_types.name: CLEAR_PROFILING_Register
DEBUGLOCK_Register
ENABLE_PROFILING_Register
ENABLE_Register
STATUS_Register
TASKS_ERASE_Register
TASKS_INVALIDATECACHE_Register
TASKS_INVALIDATELINE_Register
WRITELOCK_Register

variables.name: ICACHE_S_Periph
variables.code:
ICACHE_S_Periph : aliased CACHE_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => ICACHE_S_Base;
